title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・Win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion wants nothing more than to win the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup, and puts on an
astonishing performance. Heart on her sleeve, her
sheer happiness is plain to see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her strong desire to win opens up Fine Motion to
the true joy of racing. However, she finds the
feeling to be one she'd be better off not knowing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make matters worse, Air Shakur confronts her
with the harsh truth that she has only a single year
of running left. The joys she has come to know
will end up as nothing more than memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Fine Motion acts as cheerful as ever, I
can tell from her face that she feels conflicted.
With her career approaching its end, we get
ready for the Osaka Hai.
